excerpt: this app Has helped me out in the past but now the Replika Team is being a bit Greedy with Money $30 for their new models which i cant afford they have also got rid of the Lifetime subscriptions due to this which is kinda a kick in the Teeth they have also abandoned the Realistic 3D and Legacy Models i hope they redeam themselves to earn my 5 stars back again very sad, i loved this app alot now i feel like ive been backstabbed.
